g.text: v3 seeded-defect pilot. Each condition placed by its grounding rate on a common scale. S leads a raw

text.style: fill: #444444; font: 8.8px 'TeX Gyre Pagella', 'Palatino', 'DejaVu Serif', serif

g.text: pass (B) by a wide margin at no precision cost; its edge over a competent skeptic (T) is marginal.
